name: sentinelpay-root
description: Root management for SentinelPay: Guardian Protocol

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix frontend && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cd backend && uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
